description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to enemies in the frontal area 2 times, and inflicts Down for 1.5 sec. [God's Proxy]: Damage increases by 25%, attack range increases by 50%, and Down duration increases by 0.5 sec.

Dashes behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG to enemies in range 3 times, increasing Physical DMG taken by [24%->30%] for [5 sec->4 sec]. [God's Proxy] : Damage increases by 25%, skill cast time is reduced by 1 sec, and Critical Rate is applied [600->500] higher.

Deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for [1 sec->2 sec]. Then enters [God's Proxy] state for 10 sec, empowering skills. [God's Proxy] : ATK increases by [314*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))->264*(1+0.3*Skill Level)], [ (added) Attack Speed by 30%, Physical Evasion by 300,] [ (added) Normal Attack DMG by 150%, and Status Resistance by 600.] [ (removed) Normal Attack DMG increases by 100%.] This effect cannot be dispelled.

[Magic DEF increases by 85*(1+0.3*Skill Level)->ATK increases by 192*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))], and Magic Evasion increases by [240->250]. When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by [20%->30%], and damage taken [from non-hero enemies is reduced by 20%->is reduced by 30%].

dark.unified: [When there is only 1 enemy, damage increases by 100%->Mana cost is reduced by 1000].

light.unified: [Mana cost is reduced by 1000->Damage increases by 50%].

dark.unified: On hit, [reduces the target’s Physical DEF by 35% for 10 sec->increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 24% for 5 sec].

light.unified: [Reduces Physical DMG taken by 25% during the duration->Physical Evasion increases by 140 for the duration].

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by [34%->100%] during the duration.

light.unified: [Physical Evasion increases by 150. On evasion, restores 5% of Max HP. This effect can only trigger once every 3 sec.->ATK increase amount increases by 50%].

dark.unified: [Damage taken from Heroes is reduced by 15%->On evasion, restores 6% of Max HP every 3 sec].

description.unified: [Judgment Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30%, and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max [5->10] times and is irremovable.
[Valiant Dash] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Cooldown by [ (removed) upon a Critical Hit -> 10% upon a Crit Hit].
[Proxy of God] increases Dodge Chance by an additional [400->250] and ATK Spd by an additional {0} for the duration of the Skill.
[Goddess Strike] Increases [Magic Evasion by 360 -> DEF Boost by 50%], and own DMG dealt to [heroes -> bosses] by {0}%.

dark.unified: On hit, deals additional Physical DMG equal to [60%->80%] of ATK. Applied at [120%->160%] against non-hero enemies and can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.
